title: PostgreSQL Search, Language Policy, Ranking, Plans, and Safe Snippets · Guided Contract Studio
summary: A disability-led research network incrementally builds bounded runtime-validated reader search from original RSS, Atom, HTTP, PostgreSQL, and browser fixtures while retaining prior TypeScript, Node, HTTP-client, Express, SQL, Git, accessibility, security, testing, async-cleanup, and recovery requirements. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of bounded runtime-validated reader search while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory…
objectives: Build weighted tsvector documents from admitted safe text with language, provenance, refresh, and deletion policy.
Validate length, token count, mode, language, filters, and empty results before using parameterized plainto, websearch, or explicit tsquery.
Verify representative GIN-backed plans, selectivity, scale, write amplification, latency, row limits, and plan-change thresholds.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Feed aggregation and TypeScript Commit to the mission model · Workshop Feed Ts Search Document
steps.instruction:
workshop case — A workshop TypeScript team handles case 6106 during an inclusive cross-device research reader review. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to prove admitted search, GIN plan evidence, language and rank policy, budgets, and safe snippets; every external value must remain unknown until current runtime validation admits it; then change one tenant, cursor, reader command, authorization, validator, sanitizer, or accessibility condition without leaking state. Browser TypeScript uses pure bounded models and original RSS, Atom, HTTP, PostgreSQL, and reader fixtures only. Real DNS, Fetch, streams, fast-xml-parser, Express, PostgreSQL, processes, signals, handle and load claims, containers, accessibility review, backups, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Build weighted tsvector documents from admitted safe text with language, provenance, refresh, and deletion policy.

What must be established before implementation?

Evidence target: Feed aggregation and TypeScript Commit to the mission model · Workshop Feed Ts Search Document.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for build weighted tsvector documents from admitted safe text with language, provenance, refresh, and deletion policy. For Feed aggregation and TypeScript Commit to the mission model · Workshop Feed Ts Search Document, keep Feed Ts Search Document connected to executable TypeScript unknown-validation, async, PostgreSQL, Express, reader, package, deployment, and recovery decision evidence.
